sprints.title: Project Foundation
sprints.goal: Initialize the Vite React TypeScript baseline and core styling toolchain.

sprints.title: Design System and Routing Shell
sprints.goal: Create shared visual primitives and the public application routing shell.

sprints.title: Motion and Interaction Core
sprints.goal: Build the approved animation, reduced-motion, cursor, and interaction foundations.

sprints.title: Content Data and Reference Rules
sprints.goal: Establish verified portfolio data, typed project content, and reference adaptation rules.

sprints.title: Home, Projects, and About Pages
sprints.goal: Implement the main public portfolio pages using verified data and accessible interactions.

sprints.title: Project Detail and 3D Viewer
sprints.goal: Build detailed project storytelling, media handling, scroll narrative, and the lazy 3D viewer.

sprints.title: Release Readiness
sprints.goal: Prepare SEO, content safety, performance, and accessibility for publication.

sprints.title: Quality, CI, Deployment, and Final Validation
sprints.goal: Add automated tests, CI, deployment configuration, and final release validation.
